description_long: This is a modern, multi-story residential building with a boxy, geometric design and a flat roof. The facade features large, floor-to-ceiling windows and a dark exterior contrasted by light interior walls and wooden accents. The front of the building is lined with a row of evenly spaced trees and a paved parking area with several cars. The structure is divided into multiple apartment units, each with visible interior layouts, balconies, and open-plan living spaces. The rear and side views reveal a more utilitarian appearance with fewer windows and exposed structural elements. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and urban, emphasizing clean lines and functional living spaces.
description: A modern, multi-story apartment building with a dark facade, large windows, and a flat roof, featuring multiple units and a landscaped front with parking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, trees, and parking area.
description_view_1: Rear angled view revealing interior layouts, balconies, and fewer exterior windows.
description_view_2: Back view with a plain facade, symmetrical window rows, and exposed structural elements.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting the building's depth, balconies, and the parking area to the right.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with double doors, flanked by trees and accessed via a paved walkway and parking area, minimal decorative elements.
